rulings.Case Title: PAMELA MCGARRY VS. ADAM JASPER CRONIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 16, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT ADAM CRONIN's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED subject to: (1) Defendant shall post $7,200 (October, November and December 2014 rent/damages) with the Court no later than December 16, 2014 by 4:00 p.m.; (2) Defendant then shall file his answer no later than December 16, 2014 by 4:00 p.m.; (3) Defendant shall remit $375 to Plaintiff's counsel to compensate to attorney's fees and costs associated with obtaining default/judgment/writ. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA SIMON, AS CONSERVATOR OF THE PERSON VS. DEBORAH WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 16, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANTs DEBORAH WILLIAMS and BURON THOMPSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to December 24, 2014. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than December 16, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/RBU)
